descriptionEn: Name means "burden" or "burden bearer." He is the son of Nahum (or Naum) and father of Mattathias as listed in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,

images.caption: Prophet Amos, Russian icon from first quarter of 18th cen.
Amos. Artist: James Jacques Joseph Tissot, c. 1902
